creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
olli hauer wrote at 18:01 +0100 on Nov 17, 2009:
 > can you look if the patch from pr: 138099 is working for you?
 > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=138099

It _looks_ fine to me.  (extra tab in post-build target's command)

If that PR is committed instead, feel free to close this one.


 > I'm wondering why PR's are on hold without response for more than
 > two months.
 > 
 > PR 138099 (cvs2svn update to 2.3.0) submit date is *Sun, 23 Aug 2009*

There is a slush on I think.

But I don't think this would be considered a sweeping change, so even
though 8.0 is not released, I think this change is allowed.

I imagine that it's just because the maintainer is busy.
